'''DUM-9''' was a [[DUM-series pit droid/Legends|DUM-series pit droid]] assigned to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's]] [[Anakin Skywalker's Podracer/Legends|podracer]], during the famed [[Boonta Eve Classic (32 BBY)/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] race won by Skywalker.<ref name="CSWE" />
